description.brazilian: Conclua a missão 'Kill all the beggars', cumprindo o contrato de assassinato de Oliver Trust.
description.english: Complete the 'Kill all the beggars' quest, fulfilling Oliver Trust's assassination contract.
description.french: Terminer la quête 'Kill all the beggars' en accomplissant le contrat d'assassinat d'Oliver Trust.
description.german: Schließe die Quest 'Kill all the beggars' ab und erfülle Oliver Trusts Mordauftrag.
description.polish: Ukończ zadanie 'Kill all the beggars', realizując kontrakt na zabójstwo Oliver Trusta.
description.russian: Пройти квест «Убить всех нищих», выполнил контракт на убийство от Оливера Траста.
description.schinese: 完成支线任务「Kill all the beggars」，履行 Oliver Trust 的暗杀合同。
description.spanish: Completa la misión 'Kill all the beggars' cumpliendo el contrato de asesinato de Oliver Trust.

description.spanish: Completa la misión 'Secrets of the Pearl Craft'

description.brazilian: Conclua a missão 'Exclusive double-barreled musket' e devolva o item perdido a Humphrey.
description.english: Complete the 'Exclusive double-barreled musket' quest and return the lost item to Humphrey.
description.french: Terminer la quête 'Exclusive double-barreled musket' et rendre l'objet perdu à Humphrey.
description.german: Schließe die Quest 'Exclusive double-barreled musket' ab und bring Humphrey sein verlorenes Stück zurück.
description.polish: Ukończ zadanie 'Exclusive double-barreled musket' i zwróć zgubę Humphreyowi.
description.russian: Пройти квест «Найти двуствольный мушкет» и вернуть пропажу Хэфри.
description.schinese: 完成支线任务「Exclusive double-barreled musket」，并将失物归还给 Humphrey。
description.spanish: Completa la misión 'Exclusive double-barreled musket' y devuelve el objeto perdido a Humphrey.

description.french: Terminer la quête 'Slave Trader'
description.schinese: 完成支线任务「Slave Trader」

description.brazilian: Conclua a linha de missões 'Askold' e abra a lâmpada.
description.english: Complete the 'Askold' questline and open the lamp.

description.schinese: 完成「Askold」任务线并打开神灯。
description.spanish: Completa la cadena de misiones 'Askold' y abre la lámpara.

description.brazilian: Conclua a linha de missões 'Askold' e entregue a lâmpada à igreja.

description.polish: Ukończ linię zadań 'Askold' i oddaj lampę kościołowi.
description.russian: Пройти линейку «Аскольда» и сдать лампу в церковь.
description.schinese: 完成「Askold」任务线并将神灯献给教堂。
description.spanish: Completa la cadena de misiones 'Askold' y entrega la lámpara a la iglesia.
